title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 16 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 16 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 16 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 16/12/2021
DCE iron ore futures rose largely today, the main contract closed 673. an increase of 2.75% throughout the day; some traders were activeto sell, and steel mills purchased on demand. The spot trading volumes increased significantly over yesterday.
